vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow

triage_decision.reason: This is a standard STIG file permission hardening rule for /etc/shadow. The remediation script follows the exact pattern recommended by the STIG and is unlikely to cause lockout or system breakage.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; medium severity; file permissions
